task: use the stick to drag the cube onto the olive target
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A robotic arm is positioned over a table with a green cube, a gray cube, a pink cube, a black cube, a white cube, and a stick. The task is to use the stick to drag the green cube onto the olive target (the gray cube). The cubes are rigid and the stick is a thin, elongated object. STRATEGY - First, grasp the stick, then use it to push the green cube towards the gray cube. Ensure the stick is used as a tool to move the green cube without direct contact. Failure modes include dropping the stick or misaligning the push. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the stick. Step 2: Grasp the stick. Step 3: Use the stick to push the green cube towards the gray cube. Step 4: Release the stick.
Goal: on(green_cube, gray_cube)
Scene: green_cube, gray_cube, pink_cube, black_cube, white_cube, stick
Step 1: reach(stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the stick
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, stick, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, stick) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the stick
  contact: holding(stick) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(stick)
Step 3: push(green_cube -> gray_cube)
  affordance_region: the body of the green cube
  contact: stick_contact(green_cube) [progress]
  spatial: distance(green_cube, gray_cube, <, 0.1) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  safety: no_drop(green_cube)
  done_when: distance(green_cube, gray_cube) < 0.1
Step 4: release(stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the stick
  contact: released(stick) [completion]
  done_when: released(stick)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green cube
